gryszzz/open-thymos: Make AI agent actions authorized, auditable, and replayable not trust-the-prompt. A Rust execution kernel where signed capability writs + effect-ceiling enforcement gate every tool call, and an append-only hash-chained ledger lets you replay and audit exactly what an agent did and why. Cognition proposes; the runtime governs; the ledger records.
